subcodes.first_line: The dewdrops from the Ocean of Pre-existence have trickled forth from the Fountainhead of the Pen of the Lord of nations, assuming the form of these words: "Thy remembrance before Me..." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: رشحات بحر قدم از معین قلم مالک امم بصورت این کلمات ترشح فرموده ذکرت لدی
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual transformation
